name: MAUI LAND & PINEAPPLE CO INC
summary: Maui Land & Pineapple Company, Inc. is a Delaware corporation owning approximately 22,300 acres of land and 247,000 square feet of commercial property on Maui, Hawaii. The company operates through three segments: Land Development and Sales (planning, entitlement, and sale of residential, resort, and agricultural real estate); Leasing (commercial, industrial, and agricultural leases, trademark licensing, and water system management); and Resort Amenities (Kapalua Club operations including spa, golf courses, and beach club).

products.name: Land Development and Sales
products.description: Land planning, entitlement, development, and sales of residential, resort, commercial, agricultural, and industrial real estate on Maui.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Leasing
products.description: Leasing of 247,328 square feet of commercial, retail, and light industrial properties including restaurants, offices, and warehouses.

products.name: Agricultural Leasing
products.description: Leasing of approximately 10,300 acres for diversified agriculture, ranching, renewable energy, eco tours, and activities.

products.name: Potable and Non-Potable Water Systems
products.description: Ownership and operation of water wells, irrigation ditches, reservoirs, and transmission systems serving Kapalua Resort and agricultural users.

products.name: Kapalua Club
products.description: Private non-equity club offering members access to a spa, beach club, and two 18-hole championship golf courses at Kapalua Resort.

products.name: Trademark and Trade Name Licensing
products.description: Licensing of Kapalua brand, butterfly logo, and Maui Gold pineapple name and logo to multiple companies.

products.name: Puu Kukui Watershed Preserve
products.description: Conservation and stewardship management of a 9,000-acre nature and watershed preserve in West Maui, partially subsidized by the State of Hawaii.

partnerships.description: Joint venture BRE2 LLC formed in December 2023 to develop approximately 31 acres in Haliimaile Town into ranch lots.
